title: Improving Quick Filter and advanced Filter
excerpt: Can we have a filter added that says “all not done” in advanced search, the same way we currently have “all done”.   This will help with views and searches.

posts.author: MitchB (Mitch Blobstein)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we have a filter added that says “all not done” in advanced search, the same way we currently have “all done”. This will help with views and searches.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Mitch,

Is this what you’re referring to?

Screen Shot 2023-09-15 at 2.11.16 pm1366×492 31.8 KB

Let me know

posts.author: MitchB (Mitch Blobstein)
posts.cookedHtml: One Status column can have many “done” statuses and conversely, many “not done” statuses. When creating a view or a dashboard, today I can select “All done statuses”, I’d like to do the same thing for “all not done” statuses to make filtering in views much faster.
